## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to related issue(s): Closes #

## How

Key implementation details — what approach was taken and why.

## Testing

How was this tested?

- [ ] Application builds and starts successfully
- [ ] Tested with Docker Compose deployment
- [ ] Tested with local dev (`./start.sh`)
- [ ] Browser sessions work correctly (create, navigate, hibernate, delete)

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] i18n: user-facing strings use `vue-i18n` (if frontend change)
